$comment: Backfilled at launch. Counters in the homepage range (140s filings, 4–5K pages, 6–8 audio hours). model_flags and promoted_to_desk are plausible placeholders the principal can edit; do not treat as principal-reviewed.

model_flags.summary: Westinghouse contribution commentary 1.8× the trailing four-call mean. Tone consistent with the management's posture on the AP1000 build cycle.
Mexico tax-language emphasis broadened beyond the historical "ongoing dialogue" framing. Continues a trend the desk has been tracking since H2 2025.
Retail proprietary-product penetration discussed in opening remarks for the first time across the prior six calls. Worth re-reading against the segment-margin disclosure.

promoted_to_desk.reason: Streaming portfolio quality and per-share metric trajectory has earned a closer read; added to the desk's working note set.
Rate-base growth posture in the Coastal GasLink commissioning aftermath warrants a desk-level review.
ITC-tied capital trajectory is tightening in a way that may move the per-share dividend math; promoted for a quarterly read.
